title: NoTreePunching Basalt Fix (ARCHIVED)
description: Fixes NoTreePunching's Basalt Cobblestone and Rock item names.
body:
**Moved to [Mod Lang Fixes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mlf)**.

**Original Description:**

A small resourcepack which adds proper lang entries for NoTreePunching's Basalt Rock and Cobblestone items. (because the developer refuses to.)
